texto: If it supports the liberation struggle of Black people then it is good. If it is in opposition to the liberation struggle of Black people then it is bad. If it supports the liberation struggle of Black people then it is moral. If it opposes the liberation struggle, then it is immoral. If it supports the liberation struggle of Black people, then it is the will of GOD. If it opposes the liberation struggle of Black people, then it is satanic. With this simple key to the mysteries of life both events and institutions can be judged.
explicacao: Citação de Albert B. Cleage Jr. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If it supports the liberation struggle of Black people then it is good. If it is in opposition to…” articula reflexao, african-american, liberation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como liberation e nationalism.
